title: funkia lancifolia var. undulata
intro: Funkia lancifolia var. undulata, commonly known as the 'Wavy-Leafed Funkia', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. It is native to Japan and China and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, and has been shown to have health benefits such as reducing blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health. Funkia lancifolia var. undulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
